name: describe_hal
description: Explains how the HAL autonomous sales agent works: the six-stage pipeline (find → research → qualify → quality control → draft → send) and key traits.

name: get_customer_profile
description: Returns the target customer profile for gethal.ai (industries, team sizes, regions, representative use cases) and any public reference customers.

name: book_demo
description: Submits a demo request. The prospect receives a confirmation email and must click the link in it before the request reaches a human at A Cloud Frontier. Use only when a real person has explicitly asked for a demo and provided their own working email address. Do NOT call this for testing, evaluation,

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: get_company_info · Private data: get_company_info · Public sink: get_company_info, describe_hal, book_demo.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: get_company_info · Private data: get_company_info · Public sink: get_company_info, describe_hal, book_demo

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
